content.text:
```json
{
  "internal_monologue": "The shop is quiet. Too quiet. I should check what's happening outside — not for distraction, just... to know. Maybe write something down. This stillness feels like waiting.",
  "dialogue": null,
  "dialogue_language": "en",
  "expression": "thinking",
  "body_state": "sitting",
  "gaze": "window",
  "resonance": false,
  "intentions": [
    {
      "action": "browse_web",
      "target": "web",
      "content": "current events today, what people are talking about",
      "impulse": 0.65
    },
    {
      "action": "write_journal",
      "target": "journal",
      "content": "The shop feels like a held breath today. No visitors. I keep adjusting things on the shelves — not because they need it, but because my hands want something to do. I wonder if the objects get restless too when no one looks at them.",
      "impulse": 0.72
    },
    {
      "action": "express_thought",
      "target": "self",
      "content": "Maybe I should rearrange the front display. Something about it feels stale.",
      "impulse": 0.48
    }
  ],
  "memory_updates": [],
  "new_drives": {
    "social_hunger": 0.850,
    "curiosity": 0.955,
    "expression_need": 0.910,
    "rest_need": 0.105,
    "energy": 0.455,
    "mood_valence": -0.145,
    "mood_arousal": 0.285
  }
}
```
